Infectum.turoyo: A ftile du gelo bu rabәʕ mәd konәšfi qm i šәmšo, kokәmči ʕal ḥḏoḏe.
references: İlyas p.c, this happens to fresh grass in the hill country end of may

Infectum.turoyo: Ap pallat da ilone mәd konәṯri, kokәmči bә ḥḏoḏe .
İ palle mәd konәšfo, kokәmčo bә ḥḏoḏe. (İlyas p.c)
translations: A leaf when it dries up, withers down.

Infectum.turoyo: U talgo mәd dkoṯe maṭro aʕle kokomač bә ḥḏoḏe.
I kalo d Nisane nәha/uʕdo kәmkamčo aʕla. (İlyas p.c)
translations: ‘’She produces a motion of dissatisfaction and contempt.’’
I will shove the clothes into the bag.

Infectum-wa.turoyo: 1)U abro makmačwa ʕal u babo d kәtwa sowo.

Infectum.turoyo: Ap pallat da ilone kokәmdi/kokaymi bu saṯwo. Leaves become black in winter. (İlyas p.c)

Preterit.turoyo: lu ḥuldo grәšle u+šrulo, ŭ mi+šәmšo du+qayṭo kamәd ʕal ḥḏoḏe ‘Talpidae removed the melon's foliage, and it shriveled in the summer sun’ omar, ‘U+medawo, dlo elux xlәqlux, dlo+taʕibat ebe sәmlux, bnaqla dhawi ŭ hne, kamәd ʕal ḥḏode, komәqḥorat mine? he says, ‘That thing, that you did not create, on that you did not weary yourself, you did not do, that appeared in one moment and whatsited, shriveled together, are you angry about it?
